rationale: EE at L3 follows the IEEE Transactions structure — every flagship Transaction is essentially a community. I split power & energy systems into 4 leaves because grid/power-electronics/electric-machines/storage-integration are publishing at distinct journals. AI hardware split into accelerators, neuromorphic, photonic computing — each has a different physics. Wireless 5G/6G/satellite split because the satellite community (LEO + ISAC) has crystallized as distinct from terrestrial wireless.

subfields.name: Analog & Mixed-Signal IC Design
subfields.tagline: ADC/DAC, amplifiers, mixed-signal IC for sensing and comms.

subfields.name: RFIC & mm-Wave ICs
subfields.tagline: RFIC design, mm-wave front-ends, phased-array IC.

subfields.name: Digital VLSI & Low-Power Design
subfields.tagline: Digital design, low-power IC, near-threshold computing.

subfields.name: Power Management ICs
subfields.tagline: DC-DC converters, LDO, wireless power IC, energy harvesting IC.

subfields.name: Transistor & Device Physics
subfields.tagline: FinFET/GAA, 2D-channel transistors, advanced node device physics.

subfields.name: Power Semiconductor Devices (Wide-Bandgap)
subfields.tagline: GaN, SiC, Ga2O3 power devices, high-voltage transistors.

subfields.name: LED, Laser & Photodetector Devices
subfields.tagline: Semiconductor lasers, LEDs (incl. μLED), photodetectors, single-photon detectors.

subfields.name: Integrated Photonics & Silicon Photonics
subfields.tagline: Silicon photonic ICs, photonic interconnects, photonic computing devices.

subfields.name: Fiber-Optic Communications
subfields.tagline: Long-haul + short-reach fiber comms, coherent transmission, optical networks.

subfields.name: Metasurfaces & Flat Optics
subfields.tagline: Metasurfaces, metalenses, programmable metasurfaces, dispersion engineering.

subfields.name: Statistical & Array Signal Processing
subfields.tagline: Beamforming, DOA estimation, statistical signal processing.

subfields.name: Speech & Audio Signal Processing
subfields.tagline: Speech enhancement, source separation, audio coding, acoustic SP.

subfields.name: ML-Based Signal Processing
subfields.tagline: Learned signal processing, neural codecs (signal angle), sparse SP with ML.

subfields.name: Computational & Medical Imaging Processing
subfields.tagline: Computational imaging, medical image processing methods, learned reconstruction.

subfields.name: Video Compression & Neural Codecs
subfields.tagline: Video coding, HEVC/AV1/VVC, neural video codecs.

subfields.name: Robust & Adaptive Control
subfields.tagline: Robust control, adaptive control, model predictive control.

subfields.name: Networked Control & Cyber-Physical Systems
subfields.tagline: Networked control, CPS, multi-agent control systems.

subfields.name: Robot Hardware & Mechatronics
subfields.tagline: Robot actuator design, mechatronic systems integration, robot drives.

subfields.name: Smart Grid & Power Systems
subfields.tagline: Grid dynamics, smart grid, transmission and distribution research.

subfields.name: Power Electronics & Converters
subfields.tagline: DC-AC inverters, EV charging, motor drives power electronics.

subfields.name: Renewable Integration & Storage
subfields.tagline: Solar/wind grid integration, BESS, hybrid power plants.

subfields.name: Electric Machines & Drives
subfields.tagline: Electric motors, generators, machine design and control.

subfields.name: 5G/6G Physical Layer & Massive MIMO
subfields.tagline: 5G/6G PHY, massive MIMO, RIS, integrated sensing-comm.

subfields.name: Satellite & Non-Terrestrial Networks
subfields.tagline: Satellite comms, LEO mega-constellations, NTN integration with 5G/6G.

subfields.name: Wireless Coding & Information Theory
subfields.tagline: Channel coding (LDPC, polar), info theory for wireless.

subfields.name: IoT, Edge Compute & Vehicular Networks
subfields.tagline: IoT, edge computing, V2X, vehicular networks, low-power IoT.

subfields.name: Optical Networks
subfields.tagline: Optical networking, DCN photonics, SDN for optical networks.

subfields.name: Implantable & Wearable Bioelectronics
subfields.tagline: Implantable devices, wearable physiology monitors, neural interfaces hardware.

subfields.name: BCI Hardware & Neural Recording
subfields.tagline: BCI electrodes, multichannel neural recording IC, neurostimulation hardware.

subfields.name: ML Accelerator Architectures (ASIC/FPGA)
subfields.tagline: ML ASICs, FPGAs for ML, dataflow architectures, on-chip memory.

subfields.name: In-Memory & Analog Computing
subfields.tagline: Compute-in-memory, RRAM, analog ML computation, mixed-signal ML accelerators.

subfields.name: Neuromorphic & Photonic Computing
subfields.tagline: Spiking neural processors, photonic computing for ML, optical neural networks.

subfields.name: MEMS & Physical Sensors
subfields.tagline: MEMS, IMUs, pressure/strain sensors, environmental physical sensors.

subfields.name: Biosensors & Chemical Sensors
subfields.tagline: Electrochemical biosensors, FET biosensors, gas sensors.

subfields.name: Sensor Arrays, Calibration & Networks
subfields.tagline: Sensor fusion, calibration methods, distributed sensor networks.

subfields.name: Antenna Design & Arrays
subfields.tagline: Antenna design, phased arrays, reconfigurable antennas.

subfields.name: Microwave Circuits & EM Computation
subfields.tagline: Microwave passive circuits, EM theory and computation, propagation modeling.

subfields.name: Embedded & Real-Time Systems
subfields.tagline: Embedded software, real-time systems, automotive ECU, hardware security.

uncovered_concerns: Did not split EE software-defined radio as its own leaf — folds under wireless physical layer + ML signal processing.
Could split power-electronics by application (EV, solar, motor) at v2 — kept as 1 leaf for now.
